title: NLU pressures student to withdraw post critical of Supreme Court NCERT ruling
description: A law student from a National Law University (NLU) recently ran into trouble for having written a Substack post on the Supreme Court's decision to ban a chapter in the NCERT Class 8 textbook. As per a redacted screenshot of the email shared by the law student, the Tamil Nadu National Law University (TN NLU) administration allegedly asked him to delete his post. The email stated,"I am receiving a spate of phone calls from Advocates of the Supreme Court and various High Courts as well as a few Jud
